title: Surgeon Vacancy at Baxter India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Baxter India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Baxter India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Baxter India:
Baxter India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baxter India!
